info.title: Stax API
info.description: API for Stax automated document classifier and trust accounting system

cookieAuth.name: authToken
cookieAuth.description: Cookie-based authentication using userId and authToken cookies

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication requires two headers: 1) Authorization header with 'Bearer {apiKey}' format, and 2) email header with the user's email address for identification.

moduleAuth.name: module
moduleAuth.description: Module authentication using module ID header and Bearer token

internalAuth.name: Authorization
internalAuth.description: Internal key authentication for system-to-system communication

authError.description: Indicates if this is an authentication error

SyncConfig.description: Synchronization configuration for various cloud storage providers

stackPath.description: Path for the stack (directory components separated with /)

baseStack.description: Base stack ID to inherit from

inheritSharingFrom.description: Stack path to inherit sharing settings from

get.description: Get stack information by ID or tag
Get a list of documents in a stack with pagination and filtering

parameters.name: dir
parameters.description: Sort direction: 1 for ascending, -1 for descending

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

get.description: Get a list of all stacks for the current team

parameters.name: presigned
parameters.description: Return presigned URLs for pages and download

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

post.description: Upload one or more documents (up to 10 files)

docIds.description: Multiple document IDs for bulk update

parameters.name: stackId
parameters.description: Filter by stack ID or special values: urgent, mine, unclassified, unread, archives, shared, flagged, recent

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Metadata value to filter by (use '___unset___' to find documents without this field)

post.description: Create a document using presigned URL

get.description: Get processing jobs for a document
Get all TPA accounts for a plan

post.description: Attach a TPA statement to a document
